nasb.text: All that generation also were gathered to their fathers; and there arose another generation after them who did not know the Lord, nor yet the work which He had done for Israel.

esv.text: And all that generation also were gathered to their fathers. And there arose another generation after them who did not know the Lord or the work that he had done for Israel.

cnv.text: 那一代的人都歸到他們的列祖那裡以後，有另一代的人興起來了；他們不認識耶和華，也不知道耶和華為以色列人所行的事。

ccb.text: 那一代人都去世后，新一代不认识耶和华，也不知道耶和华为以色列人所行的事。
